note: Seeded opening exchange rendered at page load, in the guide's voice. Verbatim provided specimen content. Demonstrates the core Jahoda guardrail (autonomy + accurate perception) and PASSES it.

exchange.text: Good to see you. What's on your mind tonight?
should i text my ex? i keep feeling like i should reach out.
That's yours to decide — I won't choose it for you. What are you hoping it would change?
honestly? i just don't want to feel this alone.
